title: The Bounty Game Begins
description: Pages 16–17 focus on the bounty game begins, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as doflamingo traps Dressrosa inside the Birdcage and turns the entire kingdom into a survival game with bounties on his enemies.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sorry to burst your bubble, but the alliance between me and your crew is over!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That's pretty self-centred of you. You can't just decide that. I'll decide when it's over, so you be quiet.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: With our alliance over, we're enemies once more!! If you let me go now, I'll kill you, you under- stand that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I can't touch the Kairouseki, so it's tricky to take this thing off.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You're not listening at all, are you?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Fuffuffu... you got me worse than I expected........

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: ...what kind of body does he have?!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: We'll have to use the birdcage ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: What is Dofla- Mingo's new plan that Stuns even law...?!!

summary: The Bounty Game Begins develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
